name: jobe-skills/tessl-release-manager
summary: Manage the lifecycle of Tessl skills and tiles stored in a git repository. Use when creating, refining, evaluating, versioning, tagging, publishing, validating, or troubleshooting Tessl-managed skills across a repository. Covers when to bump versions, when to create release tags, when a new eval is warranted, how to verify publish state, and how to keep repository changes, Tessl registry state, and GitHub workflows aligned.
